outcome_contract.why: Guest portal personalization relies on the `?uuid=` query parameter in a fragile way that could cause data leakage or silent fallback to wrong guest data.
outcome_contract.intended_outcome_statement: All entry points to the guarded home pass uuid exclusively through the server-validated session; uuid tamper risk is eliminated; no guest can access another guest's data by manipulating the URL parameter.

engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: No visual changes in this plan

engineering_coverage.applicable: Context-null degrades to localStorage fallback; no new user-facing state; network error state unchanged
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: If context is null AND localStorage is null, `useUuid` returns empty string and hooks remain gated; redirect to `/error` unchanged

engineering_coverage.applicable: uuid sourced from server-validated session; URL param is advisory only; mismatch event emitted
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: Eliminates URL tamper vector; Firebase RTDB rules remain open (operator action needed for full enforcement)

engineering_coverage.applicable: Mismatch analytics event in `useUuid`; pre-release baseline captured; `console.warn` in `guest-booking.ts` unchanged
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: Mismatch event fires when URL uuid differs from context uuid

engineering_coverage.applicable: TASK-07 fixes stale mocks before TASK-02 return-type change; TASK-08 adds `useUuid` context tests; existing tests updated for new return type
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: TASK-07 must merge before or simultaneously with TASK-02 to prevent CI breakage

engineering_coverage.applicable: `/api/guest-session` GET response adds `guestUuid` field; `validateGuestToken` return type changes from string enum to `{status, guestUuid}`
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: Additive change; old callers updated in same TASK-02

engineering_coverage.applicable: One additional field in GET response — negligible; context blocks children render (populated in `GuardedGate` before `allowed` state); graceful fallback for transient GET failure
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: 26 hook call sites unchanged; no new network calls

engineering_coverage.applicable: No feature flag; code revert restores prior behavior; bookmarked `/?uuid=<id>` links work via localStorage fallback

stage_payload.summary: The prime guest portal reads the `?uuid=` URL parameter as the Firebase lookup key for all guest data without cross-checking it against the authenticated `prime_session` cookie — enabling any authenticated guest to read another occupant's data by substituting a valid-format `occ_<id>` in the URL. This plan hardens uuid resolution by extending `/api/guest-session` GET to return `guestUuid`, creating an `AuthSessionContext` populated at `GuardedGate`, and rewriting `useUuid` to read from the server-confirmed context first with localStorage fallback. Secondary fixes address a `find-booking` token
goals: Eliminate the `?uuid=` URL tamper vector for guest data access.
Bind uuid resolution to the server-validated session (`prime_session` cookie path).
Fix `find-booking` to issue tokens for the matched occupant, not the lead guest.
Fix `digital-assistant` broken auth caused by stale `prime_guest_token` body token.
Clean up `GuestSessionSnapshot` type divergence and stale test mocks.
Add test coverage for uuid tamper, mismatch, and localStorage fallback.
non_goals: Rewriting Firebase RTDB security rules (out-of-codebase-scope; operator confirmation needed).
Addressing `fetchViaFullScan` passive full-scan exposure (separate feature slug needed).
constraints: Cloudflare Pages Functions (CF Pages edge) — no server-side React rendering in the data-fetch path; context must be populated client-side after a GET to `/api/guest-session`.
26 `useUuid()` call sites must continue to work after the change; `useUuid()` API surface stays `string` (empty string fallback, not `string | null`, per current return type).
assumptions: Firebase RTDB rules are assumed open (API-key-only) — this determines whether the fix is urgent vs. defense-in-depth, but does not change what is built.

`/api/assistant-query` validates `body.token` using `validateGuestSessionToken()` (CF Functions library, cookie-independent). The fix is to switch it to `prime_session` cookie auth (same pattern as all other CF Functions).
`GuestSessionToken` in Firebase includes `guestUuid` for all active sessions (written by `guest-session` POST and `find-booking`).
selected_approach: What was chosen: Server-authoritative uuid via `AuthSessionContext` populated at `GuardedGate`, with localStorage fallback for transient failures and for `app/page.tsx` root-page path.

Why planning is not reopening option selection: Analysis made the decision decisively. All four alternatives have documented rejection rationale. The only open question (Firebase RTDB rules) is operator-only and does not change what is built.

task_briefs.title: Extend `/api/guest-session` GET response to include `guestUuid`
task_briefs.deliverable: Modified `apps/prime/functions/api/guest-session.ts` — GET handler returns `{status, expiresAt, guestUuid}`.

task_briefs.title: Clean up stale `GuestSessionSnapshot` type + test mocks
task_briefs.deliverable: Updated `apps/prime/src/lib/auth/__tests__/guestSessionGuard.test.ts`, `apps/prime/src/hooks/__tests__/useSessionValidation.test.ts`, and any other test file with stale `token` mock field or `token` parameter on `validateGuestToken`.

task_briefs.title: Capture pre-release baseline for `/error` redirect rate
task_briefs.deliverable: Baseline measurement note in `docs/plans/prime-portal-personalization/plan.md` Decision Log (or a separate `baseline.md` artifact) documenting the current `/error` redirect rate from `useUuid`. Required before TASK-04 ships.

task_briefs.title: Update `validateGuestToken` return type + all 4 callers
task_briefs.deliverable: Updated `apps/prime/src/lib/auth/guestSessionGuard.ts` (`validateGuestToken` returns `{status: TokenValidationResult, guestUuid: string | null}`); updated callers: `app/page.tsx`, `app/portal/page.tsx`, `app/(guarded)/layout.tsx`, `hooks/useSessionValidation.ts`; updated tests.

task_briefs.title: Fix `digital-assistant` auth — switch `/api/assistant-query` to cookie auth
task_briefs.deliverable: Updated `apps/prime/functions/api/assistant-query.ts` (validate via `prime_session` cookie, not body token); updated `apps/prime/src/app/(guarded)/digital-assistant/page.tsx` (remove `prime_guest_token` body field).

task_briefs.title: Create `AuthSessionContext` + populate in `GuardedGate`
task_briefs.deliverable: New `apps/prime/src/contexts/auth/AuthSessionContext.tsx`; updated `apps/prime/src/app/(guarded)/layout.tsx` (`GuardedGate` stores `guestUuid` from `validateGuestToken` result in context).

task_briefs.title: Rewrite `useUuid` — context-first, localStorage fallback, mismatch telemetry
task_briefs.deliverable: Updated `apps/prime/src/hooks/useUuid.ts` — reads `AuthSessionContext` first, falls back to `localStorage['prime_guest_uuid']`, emits mismatch telemetry when URL uuid differs from context uuid, removes URL-as-primary-source behavior.

task_briefs.title: Add unit tests for `useUuid` — context, localStorage fallback, null-both, mismatch
task_briefs.deliverable: New/updated `apps/prime/src/hooks/__tests__/useUuid.test.ts` with full unit test coverage for the rewritten hook.

areas.label: GuardedGate auth + uuid binding
areas.trigger: Guest navigates to any route under `(guarded)/`
areas.flow: (1) `GuardedGate` calls `validateGuestToken()` → now returns `{status, guestUuid}`. (2) On `valid`, stores `guestUuid` in `AuthSessionContext`. (3) Renders children with context populated. (4) `useUuid()` in any child reads context uuid. (5) On transient failure (`network_error`), context is null — `useUuid` falls back to localStorage. (6) 30-min `useSessionValidation` interval unchanged.
areas.seams: Context-population race: must ensure context is stored before `gateState='allowed'` triggers child render; TASK-03 execution plan must address this ordering.

areas.label: uuid resolution in data hooks
areas.flow: `useUuid()` reads `AuthSessionContext` first (server-confirmed). Falls back to `localStorage['prime_guest_uuid']` if context absent. URL `?uuid` param is advisory only; if it differs from context uuid, mismatch event emitted and context uuid wins.
areas.seams: `app/page.tsx` root page: intentionally excluded from context — uses localStorage path. Code comment added.

areas.label: find-booking token issuance
areas.flow: Token issued for `matchedOccupantId` (not `leadOccupantId`). Non-lead guests get session scoped to their own uuid.

areas.label: Digital assistant auth
areas.flow: `digital-assistant/page.tsx` removes `prime_guest_token` body field; sends query without token body field. `/api/assistant-query` validates via `prime_session` cookie (same pattern as `/api/guest-session`).
areas.seams: `/api/assistant-query` must be updated to use cookie-based `validateGuestSessionToken` helper (or inline cookie parse).

areas.label: Type / test cleanup
areas.flow: `GuestSessionSnapshot` type does not include `token` field. Tests for `readGuestSession` expect no `token` in snapshot. `validateGuestToken` mock shape updated to return `{status, guestUuid}`. `useSessionValidation` tests drop stale `token` prop.
areas.seams: Must complete before TASK-02 merges to avoid CI failure window.
